title: rhachidosorus stramineus
intro: Rhachidosorus stramineus, also known as the Stramineus fern or Cinnamon fern, is a species of fern found in tropical forests. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Rhachidosorus stramineus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or dried powder for use in traditional remedies.
